mapper.select: SELECT member_id AS id, login_id AS loginId, password, email, nickname, role, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM member WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (login_id, password, email, nickname, role, status) VALUES (#{loginId}, #{password}, #{email}, #{nickname}, #{role}, #{status})
